title: Ramp Prep
summary: Practical Ramp-style drills focused on API traversal, temporal state, ledgers, sliding windows, and progressive in-memory systems.

entries.note: sort by start time, merge overlaps and touching blocks
insert a new interval into a clean schedule and merge
compute total covered duration without double-counting overlaps
grouping, date cadence detection, month-end edge cases
count visits in a recent time window
same recent-window shape with a rolling sum
same recent-window shape with distinct users and a frequency map
one-minute visit counting, per-user rate limits
CRUD, priority sorting, quotas, assignments, overdue state
